title: Piquant Nutty Korean Pepper Jorim
description: A bold, nutty Korean jorim featuring roasted red pepper and almonds, finished with a spicy sweet sauce.
instructions: Roast halved bell pepper in oven at 400F for 20 minutes until charred, then peel and seed.
Whisk coconut aminos, honey, gochujang, minced garlic, and ginger until smooth.
Heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium heat and add roasted pepper, stirring for 1 minute.
Pour the sauce mixture into the skillet, add water, and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add roasted almond slices to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken.
Sprinkle sliced green onions and toasted sesame seeds over the dish.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
Serve hot over cauliflower rice or as a side dish.
